# MeshCtx — llms.txt
# AI Agent accessibility for MeshCtx documentation

## MeshCtx
MeshCtx is the world's first self-evolving AI agent platform with full-brain emulation architecture (10 brain regions).

## Core Features
- Super Brain Architecture: 10 brain regions (Hippocampal Replay, Amygdala, DMN, Thalamus, Cerebellum, Basal Ganglia, ACC, Mirror Neurons, Insula)
- Hierarchical Memory (L0-L4) with Ebbinghaus Forgetting Curve
- Meta-Cognition loop: evaluate → extract patterns → update knowledge graph
- Multi-Agent Orchestra with DAG task decomposition
- MCP Protocol native
- 7-language support (EN/ZH/JA/KO/FR/DE/ES)
- Windows/macOS/Linux cross-platform

## Quick Links
- Homepage: https://meshctx.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/LucyAndLuna2023/meshctx
- Download: https://meshctx.com/#download
- Setup: https://meshctx.com/ui/setup
- Chat: https://meshctx.com/ui/chat
- Desktop Monitor: https://meshctx.com/ui/desktop

## Installation
- Windows: Download meshctx-setup.exe from GitHub Releases
- macOS: brew install meshctx or DMG from Releases
- Linux: git clone + python3 -m venv .venv + pip install

## API Endpoints
- GET /api/models — List all models
- POST /api/models — Add model
- PUT /api/models/{id} — Update model
- DELETE /api/models/{id} — Delete model
- PATCH /api/models/{id}/default — Set default
- POST /api/models/{id}/test — Test connection
- POST /api/chat — Chat with AI
- POST /api/chat/stream — Streaming chat
- POST /api/chat/upload — Upload file for context

## Optional
- Documentation: https://meshctx.com/docs
- Benchmark: https://github.com/LucyAndLuna2023/meshctx/blob/main/tests/benchmark_v19.py
